lines: Butters, sitting pretty at the top on 80pts, has had Portugal ripped out of his hands by a single Jim Fucking Spain goal. A 0–1 loss to Spain means Cristiano and the lads are done, and Butters is now entirely dependent on Morocco and Norway like some kind of panicked hedge fund manager who just watched his star stock collapse.
Jim, the smug bastard, is up to 5th on 59pts and Spain are still alive — quietly doing Jim favours while the rest of us were busy not noticing. Don't sleep on him.

Wilmot — third place, 75pts, and somehow the most annoying person in this sweepstake — has England, Morocco AND Norway still in. Three teams. Three. He didn't earn that, he just got lucky, and everyone here knows it. Absolute fluke merchant. Hope all three get knocked out in the same evening and he has to sit there pretending he's fine.

Today Ellis — yes, Ellis, dead last on 38pts with a squad that reads like a Ryanair destination list — has Argentina vs Egypt, which is literally the only reason she's still relevant. Messi better drag that nation through or Ellis is cooked, done, finished, a beautiful disaster.

Also today: Switzerland vs Colombia, which has Carter and The Foreman absolutely bricking it together like two blokes sharing one parachute. Carter's in 4th, Foreman's in 8th — Colombia is all they've got left that matters. Lose this and The Foreman is basically just a France fan with nothing to show for it. Watch this one closely.
